headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Labcorp (NYSE:LH) And The Rest Of The Testing & Diagnostics Services Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how testing & diagnostics services stocks fared in Q4, starting with Labcorp (NYSE:LH).
